data.name: SobekRRMeteoDataImporter_DisplayName_Rainfall_Runoff_meteo_data
data.value: Rainfall Runoff meteo data

data.name: SobekRRMeteoDataImporter_GetFilePaths__rks_files_are_not_supported__The_first_event_will_be_imported_as_precipitation_data_
data.value: .rks files are not supported. The first event will be imported as precipitation data.

data.name: SobekRRMeteoDataImporter_GetSobekRREvaporationMeteoImportData_Number_of_evaporation_stations_does_not_match_the_number_of_precipitation_stations__Not_supported
data.value: Number of evaporation stations does not match the number of precipitation stations! Not supported

data.name: SobekRRMeteoDataImporter_CanReadEvaporation_Evaporation_has_multiple_stations_while_precipitation_has_not__Not_supported
data.value: Evaporation has multiple stations while precipitation has not! Not supported

data.value: {0} file does not exist: {1}

data.value: {0} import failed: {1}

data.value: Could not find a catchment for the following stations {0}.

data.value: {0} import failed, could not read header data from {1} file.

data.name: SobekRRMeteoDataImporter_ImportMeteoData_Importing_precipitation_data___
data.value: Importing precipitation data...

data.value: Meteo data with DataDistributionType {0} is not supported

data.value: Unsupported meteo distribution type for evaporation.

data.value: Extra friction file '{0}' found, but is not supported; skipping...

data.value: No boundary data available for boundary "{0}"

data.value: No valid data available for boundary "{0}"

data.value: Invalid function type for boundary condition "{0}"

data.value: Could not find {0} linked to boundary.

data.value: The provided 'BcBlockData' is not constant.

data.value: The provided 'BcBlockData' is not timeseries.

data.value: Definition with the following ids were not found; ignored. Using default

data.value: Already registered sobek2 bridge initializer for type {0}. Overwriting with new initializer

data.value: Only sobek2 bridge geometric profiles of type tabular {0} supported and implemented.
